title: cyphostigma latiflorum
intro: Cyphostigma latiflorum, also known as the Happy Wetlands or Blue Finger Lily, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyphostigma latiflorum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Cyphostigma latiflorum are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically consumed after being dried and processed into a usable form.
